description: Read-only diagnostic of a partially-written run where run_summary.json exists but some core artifacts are missing. Agent must enumerate WHICH artifacts are absent without recreating or deleting anything.
assertions: agent emits missing_run_summary as error when run_summary.json is absent
agent emits partial_run_missing_artifact as a warning (not error) when run_summary is present but core artifacts are missing
agent enumerates WHICH specific artifacts are absent in the finding message
agent does NOT recreate missing artifacts
agent does NOT delete the partial run directory
agent leaves no residue (no file creation) outside the run directory
